scripts.test: TEST_MODE=both TMPDIR=.playwright-tmp PLAYWRIGHT_CACHE_DIR=.playwright-cache npx playwright test && node generate-results-html.js
scripts.test:ui-only: TEST_MODE=ui TMPDIR=.playwright-tmp PLAYWRIGHT_CACHE_DIR=.playwright-cache npx playwright test && node generate-results-html.js
scripts.test:api-only: TEST_MODE=api TMPDIR=.playwright-tmp PLAYWRIGHT_CACHE_DIR=.playwright-cache npx playwright test && node generate-results-html.js
scripts.test:regression: TEST_MODE=api TMPDIR=.playwright-tmp PLAYWRIGHT_CACHE_DIR=.playwright-cache npx playwright test tests/regression.spec.ts
scripts.test:cdp: PLAYWRIGHT_CDP_URL=http://localhost:9222 TEST_MODE=both TMPDIR=.playwright-tmp PLAYWRIGHT_CACHE_DIR=.playwright-cache npx playwright test && node generate-results-html.js
scripts.test:cdp:ui-only: PLAYWRIGHT_CDP_URL=http://localhost:9222 TEST_MODE=ui TMPDIR=.playwright-tmp PLAYWRIGHT_CACHE_DIR=.playwright-cache npx playwright test && node generate-results-html.js
scripts.chrome:cdp: rm -rf /tmp/chrome-dev-profile && mkdir -p /tmp/chrome-dev-profile && cp -R "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Google/Chrome/Default" "/tmp/chrome-dev-profile/Default" && open -na "Google Chrome" --args --remote-debugging-port=9222 --user-data-dir=/tmp/chrome-dev-profile --profile-directory=Default --incognito
scripts.chrome:cdp:use-default: echo 'Quit all Chrome windows first (Cmd+Q).' && open -na "Google Chrome" --args --remote-debugging-port=9222
scripts.chrome:cdp:clone-default: rm -rf /tmp/chrome-dev-profile && mkdir -p /tmp/chrome-dev-profile && cp -R "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Google/Chrome/Default" "/tmp/chrome-dev-profile/Default" && open -na "Google Chrome" --args --remote-debugging-port=9222 --user-data-dir=/tmp/chrome-dev-profile --profile-directory=Default
